mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENT_LIKE ( COMMENT_ID, MEMBER_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{comment_id}, #{member_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE POST_COMMENT SET LIKE_COUNT = CASE WHEN NVL(LIKE_COUNT, 0) > 0 THEN NVL(LIKE_COUNT, 0) - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{comment_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENT_REPORT ( REPORT_ID, COMMENT_ID, MEMBER_ID, REASON, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( COMMENT_REPORT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{comment_id}, #{member_id}, #{reason}, SYSDATE )
